model._comment: Base model (last fallback before session model).

observerModel._comment: Observer primary: Qwen3 Next 80B via OpenRouter free (strong extraction with reasoning).

observerFallbackModels._comment: Observer fallback 1: Gemma 4 31B via Ollama Cloud.
Observer fallback 2: Gemma 4 31B via OpenRouter free tier.

reflectorModel._comment: Reflector primary: GPT OSS 120B via Cerebras (strong reasoning for synthesis).

reflectorFallbackModels._comment: Reflector fallback 1: GLM-4.7 via z.ai with thinking enabled.
Reflector fallback 2: GPT OSS 120B via OpenRouter free tier.

dropperModel._comment: Dropper primary: GPT OSS 120B via Cerebras (judgment/prioritization).

dropperFallbackModels._comment: Dropper fallback 2: GPT OSS 120B via OpenRouter free tier.

_notes: Observer: qwen3-next-80b → gemma4:31b-cloud → google/gemma-4-31b-it:free → base model → session
Reflector: gpt-oss-120b (cerebras) → glm-4.7 (z.ai) → openai/gpt-oss-120b:free → base model → session
Dropper:  gpt-oss-120b (cerebras) → glm-4.7 (z.ai) → openai/gpt-oss-120b:free → base model → session
On retryable error (429, 5xx, timeout), the model is cooled down for cooldownHours.
Cooled-down models are skipped on subsequent consolidation attempts until cooldown expires.
After all candidates exhausted, the stage aborts. 30s retry gate prevents spam.
Valid thinking values: off, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh.
Env override for passive mode: PI_BLACKHOLE_PASSIVE=true.
